Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 4 1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 1 0 0}Oh, Kirijo-senpai. Why are you here?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_001_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 3 0 0}Mr. Ekoda, I'm here to ask you about a student named Fuuka Yamagishi.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_003_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 223 10 1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 5 0 0}Please, I... I never thought it'd turn out this way.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_005_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 8 0 0}What did you do to Yamagishi?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_006_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1082 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 9 0 0}{f 5 21 0 1082}Hold on, Kirijo-kun, this isn't an interrogation. Stop scaring her.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1082 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 10 0 0}{f 5 21 0 1082}Moriyama, you don't have to say anything if you don't want to.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1082 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 11 0 0}{f 5 21 0 1082}You wouldn't want to give her the wrong idea.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_007_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 223 3 1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 13 0 0}She always looked so frazzled whenever I gave her a hard time.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 223 3 1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 14 0 0}That's when I realized. She may be a model student, but deep down, she's just like us.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 223 3 1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 15 0 0}And because of that... I knew exactly which buttons to push.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 223 2 1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 16 0 0}We were just messing with her earlier that day, too![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_008_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 223 3 1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 18 0 0}We took Fuuka to the gym, and locked the door from the outside...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_009_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 4 1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 19 0 0}Wait, what!? You trapped her inside!?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_011_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 223 3 1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 20 0 0}That night, Maki got worried Fuuka might commit suicide, so she went back to the school by herself.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 223 3 1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 21 0 0}But, she never came back. And the next morning...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_012_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 22 0 0}She was found lying outside the front gate.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_013_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 223 3 1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 23 0 0}I went to the gym to let Fuuka out, but the door was still locked.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 223 3 1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 24 0 0}So I opened it and went inside, but she wasn't there.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 223 3 1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 25 0 0}We all freaked out. Starting that night, we went out looking for her.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 223 3 1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 26 0 0}But every night, another one of us wouldn't come back, and then they all ended up like Maki![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_014_3_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 28 0 0}Mr. Ekoda. All this time you've been reporting Yamagishi as absent due to "illness."[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 29 0 0}But the truth of the matter is that she was missing. You had to have known this.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_015_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1082 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 31 0 0}{f 5 21 0 1082}I was thinking of the students, of course.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1082 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 32 0 0}{f 5 21 0 1082}You children may not understand, but we have to consider the future of everyone affected.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_016_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 2 1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 33 0 0}So you chose not to report a missing child for "the good of the class," and not because you didn't want the police involved.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_017_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1082 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 35 0 0}{f 5 21 0 1082}I wouldn't want her records to be stained by something like this. Her parents agreed![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_018_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 6 1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 36 0 0}So to protect your career, you ignored your responsibility as a teacher.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_019_2_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 40 0 0}That's enough. You can go now. We'll handle the rest.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_019_6_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 42 0 0}Don't worry. This won't be the last you'll hear of this.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_020_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 44 0 0}About your friends. Did you notice anything unusual about them before they went missing?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_021_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 223 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 49 0 0}They all mentioned it right before they went missing.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 223 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 50 0 0}They said they could hear it {f 0 1 33}calling their name{f 0 1 27}.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_024_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 54 0 0}Up until now, we've never been able to predict who exactly would become aware during the Dark Hour. This voice must be the key.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 55 0 0}{f 4 22 0 5 24 25 21}In other words, it doesn't just happen randomly. They actually get drawn in.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 5 1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 56 0 0}I realize now after seeing all of this: They're clearly targeting humans.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 5 1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 57 0 0}{f 4 22 0 5 47 25 48}Shadows are most definitely the enemy of mankind.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_025_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 58 0 0}Stay at our dorm tonight. That should be the safest place.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 59 0 0}{f 4 22 0 5 49 25 21}If you hear the voice, tell us immediately.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 60 0 0}And don't leave your room, no matter what happens.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 61 0 0}If you can manage that, you should be fine.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 62 0 0}{f 4 22 0 5 24 25 21}Don't worry, Yamagishi should be all right as well.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_027_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 66 0 0}We'll meet after school in the student council room to discuss tonight's operation.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_029_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 68 0 0}Yes. We're going to rescue Fuuka Yamagishi.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 69 0 0}If my guess is right, she's still inside the school.[n]{f 1 1}
